title: hieracium neyranum subsp. neyranum
intro: Hieracium neyranum subsp. neyranum, also known as Neyran Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. Neyran Hawkweed is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium neyranum subsp. neyranum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
